title: memory_libmap creates initialized registers but some architectures don't support them

features.name: memory array with readmemh initialization
features.description: Code should include a memory array declaration with $readmemh initial loading in an initial block, where the memory is an unpacked array of registers

features.name: synchronous memory read through registered output
features.description: Code should include a synchronous read from memory where data is read on posedge clock into a registered output, creating read-through-DFF behavior

features.name: memory read-first emulation with initialized DFF
features.description: Code should include memory read operations that trigger tool internal DFF creation for read-first emulation, where the tool-generated initialized DFFs cause architecture incompatibility
